steps.action: Launched the native Tauri app with an empty isolated HOME and captured the first render of the default Central Skills route.
steps.expected: On first launch with no pre-existing skills data, the app should complete the scan, show the sidebar with platforms, and present meaningful onboarding guidance.
steps.observed: The real Tauri window showed the sidebar populated with built-in platforms (all zero-count on first visit), the `Welcome to skills-manage!` empty state, guidance for creating `~/.agents/skills/my-skill/SKILL.md`, and a `Go to Settings` call to action.

frictions.description: Launching against a different HOME causes Cargo/Tauri to rebuild more of the dev stack than a same-HOME rerun would.
frictions.resolution: Accepted the longer startup and captured evidence once the isolated first-visit window became available.

summary: Validated the first-visit experience against an empty isolated HOME. The native Tauri app showed a stable sidebar plus meaningful empty-state guidance and a Settings call to action on first launch.
